use_cases: Displaying success messages after form submissions or completed actions
Showing destructive or error alerts when operations fail
Presenting informational or warning notifications to guide user behavior
Providing dismissible inline alerts for validation messages
Creating toast-style notifications with close functionality
ai_summary: A versatile alert/toast notification component with multiple semantic variants (destructive, success, info, warning, primary, secondary) and appearance styles (solid, outline, light, stroke). Built with CVA for type-safe variant management, featuring three size options and a close button for dismissible notifications. Suitable for displaying user feedback, validation messages, and status updates across various SaaS, e-commerce, and application contexts.
